chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.D- 43 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.04.2026. Mr. Shakir Nawaz Shar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G for State. = After hearing at some length, learned counsel for the applicant does not wish to press this bail application and submits that he would be satisfied if directions are given to the learned trial Court to conclude the trial within a period of Sixty days from the date of passing of this order. Learned A.P.G extends his no objection to the above proposition. In view of above, instant bail application is disposed of with direction to the learned trial Court to expedite the trial and conclude it within a period of Sixty days under intimation to this Court. In case of failure, the applicant would be at liberty to move a fresh bail application, as deemed fit. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
